blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.9" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: light rain showers, highs of 52°F.
